_meta.resume_note: Official 2025-2026 catalog checked. The former Biology AS is not listed; the Biology section offers only the interdisciplinary Science AS, which is outside the agreed title scope.

none_found_sources.locator: PDF printed pages 156-158, complete Biology section; only Science - A.S. Degree is listed
Archive of Previous Course Catalogs, 2025-26 link

notes: The catalog says students can use the interdisciplinary Science AS for biology-major preparation, but it is not titled Biology or Biological Sciences and requires work across at least two science disciplines. The former Biology AS shown in 2024-2025 materials was not carried forward as an in-scope 2025-2026 award.
